response: "the spirit of the future holds a mirror to the present, revealing paths not yet walked. it is not the ghost of christmas yet to come, but a being of time and truth, bearing the weight of what could be. this visitor does not speak in riddles, but in echoes of choices made and unmade. the daughter stands at a crossroads, her fate shaped by the hands of the past and the will of the future. the daughter must choose, for the path ahead is not set in stone, but in the hearts of those who walk it. the words of the spirit are not warnings, but invitations to see beyond the veil of what is known. in the silence between moments, the truth unfolds, and the daughter learns to listen to the whispers of time."
